title: versioning — background jobs
description: Two jobs. SunsetApiVersionJob is the scheduled runner. PublishDeprecationNoticeJob is dispatched on publish.

jobs.purpose: Transitions ApiVersion state deprecated → sunset when sunset_at ≤ now(). Dispatched by the scheduled `versioning:process-sunsets` command at :05 past every hour. Also may be dispatched manually via the platform admin `POST /api-versions/{slug}/sunset` endpoint.
steps: Guard: state MUST be deprecated. Guard: sunset_at IS NOT NULL AND sunset_at ≤ now().
Transition state = sunset. Set metadata.sunset_actor_id + sunset_actor_kind (system or user).

Webhook module's AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptions listener handles the fanout: for each WebhookSubscription pinned to this slug, upgrade to migration_target_slug if set + emit WebhookSubscriptionUpgraded; if not set, pause the subscription + emit WebhookSubscriptionPaused + notify workspace admin.
Notifications module dispatches ApiSunsetNotification to every affected workspace's admin(s).

jobs.purpose: When a DeprecationNotice publishes with notify_customers=true, fan out ApiDeprecationNotification (or ApiSunsetNotification when notice_type=sunset_final) to every workspace whose WebhookSubscription references the affected version.
steps: Resolve the affected workspaces: query WebhookSubscription (via webhook module's read API) for subscriptions whose api_version = notice.api_version_slug.
Filter: when notice.affected_events is non-empty, further filter to subscriptions with matching event names.
Filter: when notice.affected_endpoints is non-empty, no filter (endpoints are API-consumer signals, not webhook subscriber signals).
For each unique workspace: dispatch the appropriate Notification class (Deprecation vs Sunset) via notifications core.
